title: Second Round of US-Iran Nuclear Talks in Geneva
detail: The US and Iran hold their second round of indirect nuclear negotiations at the Omani consulate in Geneva. Iran's FM Araghchi and US envoys Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff lead their delegations. Araghchi says 'guiding principles' have been agreed upon. However, Iran refuses to end all enrichment or negotiate ballistic missile limits — the core US demands. Iran offers to return in two weeks with detailed proposals to address gaps.

title: Iran Briefly Closes Strait of Hormuz for Live-Fire Drills
detail: Iran temporarily closes the Strait of Hormuz to commercial shipping on the second day of the IRGC 'Smart Control' maritime exercise. Live-fire drills include anti-ship missile tests and fast-boat swarm tactics. The closure disrupts tanker traffic and sends oil prices surging. CENTCOM calls the closure 'a reckless provocation' as US destroyers USS Mitscher and USS Michael Murphy maintain positions nearby in international waters.
